pd:dataInput.pd:label: CRAM Input Files
pd:dataInput.pd:description: Input CRAM files. FASTQs should NOT be provided if CRAM files are selected. When provided, the pipeline converts CRAM to BAM before running DRAGEN.

pd:dataInput.pd:label: CRAM Reference
pd:dataInput.pd:description: A folder containing CRAM reference FA.GZ and FAI. Required when using CRAM input.This must be different from the DRAGEN Reference

pd:dataInput.pd:label: FASTQ Input Files
pd:dataInput.pd:description: Input FASTQ files. CRAM should NOT be provided if FASTQ files are selected. Multiple samples may be provided. If a supplementary FASTQ list is not provided, the pipeline will attempt to determine which FASTQ files belong together via the naming scheme. The RGSM will be taken as the name up to "_SX" and the suffix after "_RX." "_LXXX" in the filename denotes the lane number and "_RX" to denotes the read number. If either is omitted, lane 1 and read 1 will be used in the FASTQ list. The tool will automatically write a FASTQ list from all files provided and process each sample.

pd:dataInput.pd:label: FASTQ List CSV (optional)
pd:dataInput.pd:description: Optional FASTQ list CSV to override auto-generated groupings. Use filename only (not full path). FASTQ files must still be provided via the FASTQs field. Columns: RGID, RGSM, RGLB, Lane, Read1, Read2.

pd:dataInput.pd:label: QC Coverage Region BED Files (up to 3)
pd:dataInput.pd:description: Up to 3 BED files can be provided for the --qc-coverage-region-n option. Files are automatically assigned to --qc-coverage-region-1, --qc-coverage-region-2, and --qc-coverage-region-3 based on the order they are provided.

pd:dataInput.pd:label: QC Cross Contamination VCF
pd:dataInput.pd:description: VCF or VCF.GZ file for cross contamination QC. Corresponds to DRAGEN argument "--qc-cross-cont-vcf".

pd:dataInput.pd:label: Additional Files
pd:dataInput.pd:description: Additional files to be input to DRAGEN. The file type must be set to "UNKNOWN." Reference uploaded files by their filename in "Additional DRAGEN Args". WES examples: Upload target.bed, then add: --vc-target-bed target.bed. Upload cnv_pon.txt.gz, then add: --cnv-combined-counts cnv_pon.txt.gz. WGS examples: Upload pop_snp.vcf.gz, then add: --cnv-population-b-allele-vcf pop_snp.vcf.gz.

pd:parameter.pd:label: Enable DRAGEN Reports
pd:parameter.pd:description: DRAGEN Reports will output an HTML file, "report.html" that displays the various metrics.

pd:parameter.pd:label: Additional DRAGEN Args
pd:parameter.pd:description: Additional DRAGEN args can be provided here. If additional files are needed, please add them to the "Additional Files" input. Reference uploaded files by filename.

pd:parameter.pd:label: Enable Map/Align
pd:parameter.pd:description: Corresponds to DRAGEN argument "--enable-map-align". When enabled, also sets --enable-map-align-output true and --enable-duplicate-marking true.

pd:step.pd:label: Variant Caller Options
pd:step.pd:description: Common variant callers shared between WGS and WES.

pd:parameter.pd:label: Enable SV Calling
pd:parameter.pd:description: Corresponds to DRAGEN argument "--enable-sv". For WES, also add "--sv-exome true" and "--sv-call-regions-bed" via Additional DRAGEN Args.

pd:parameter.pd:label: Enable CNV Calling
pd:parameter.pd:description: Corresponds to DRAGEN argument "--enable-cnv". Example for WGS, add "--cnv-enable-self-normalization true" via Additional DRAGEN Args. Example for WES, add "--cnv-target-bed" and "--cnv-combined-counts pon.target.counts" via Additional DRAGEN Args.

pd:parameter.pd:label: DRAGEN Error Strategy
pd:parameter.pd:description: Controls pipeline behavior when a DRAGEN sample fails. 'auto' (default): terminates on single-sample runs, continues processing remaining samples on multi-sample runs. 'ignore': always continues. 'terminate': always stops on first failure.
